name: Oura Ring
description: Exports your Oura Ring readiness scores, sleep data, and daily activity using Playwright browser automation.

scopes.label: Your daily readiness scores
scopes.description: Daily readiness scores and contributing factors like HRV balance, resting heart rate, recovery, and body temperature

scopes.label: Your sleep data
scopes.description: Daily sleep scores with contributor breakdowns and detailed sleep period data including duration, stages, heart rate, and HRV

scopes.label: Your daily activity
scopes.description: Daily activity scores, step counts, calorie burn, and activity level breakdowns
